en_title: EXCLUSIVE: First Look at EA Sports FC 26 The World's Game Update
cn_title: 独家：《EA Sports FC 26》「世界舞台」更新首曝

paragraphs.en: With the World Cup just weeks away, IGN can reveal The World's Game update for EA Sports FC 26 and EA Sports FC Mobile with exclusive screenshots and details.
paragraphs.cn: 距离世界杯只剩短短几周，IGN独家曝光了《EA Sports FC 26》和《EA Sports FC Mobile》「世界舞台（The World's Game）」更新的独家截图与详细内容。

paragraphs.en: The World's Game Update, due out May 28, lets players lead a nation in a new 48-team international tournament mode starting June 4. EA Sports doesn't have the official license for the FIFA World Cup itself (EA Sports' FIFA series switched to EA Sports FC for the 2023 entry), but the new update features 53 fully licensed and playable national teams, 41 of which are competing in the actual World Cup.
paragraphs.cn: 「世界舞台」更新将于5月28日上线，玩家可以从6月4日起在全新的48支国家队国际锦标赛模式中带领某支国家队征战。EA Sports并不拥有FIFA世界杯本身的官方授权（EA Sports的FIFA系列在2023年版本起更名为EA Sports FC），但本次更新仍包含53支完全获得授权、可游玩的国家队，其中41支队伍是真实参加世界杯的球队。

paragraphs.en: Fully licensed and playable national teams include Brazil, England, France, Cabo Verde, and Uzbekistan. New stadiums include Gillette Stadium and BMO Field, alongside Central Maw, "a new stadium built to capture the atmosphere of top-tier international football."
paragraphs.cn: 完全获得授权、可游玩的国家队包括巴西、英格兰、法国、佛得角与乌兹别克斯坦等。新球场包括美国吉列体育场（Gillette Stadium）、加拿大BMO Field，以及Central Maw——一座「为还原顶级国际足球氛围而打造的新球场」。

paragraphs.en: The slideshow below includes two exclusive images, revealing the Mexico and Morocco national teams as they appear in The World's Game update. Other images included show Cristiano Ronaldo's Portugal, Virgil van Dijk's Holland, and the United States national team.
paragraphs.cn: 下方幻灯片中包含两张独家图片，展示了「世界舞台」更新中墨西哥与摩洛哥国家队的造型。其他图片还包括C罗领衔的葡萄牙队、范戴克带队的荷兰队，以及美国国家队。

paragraphs.en: EA Sports said the World's Game features two non-licensed teams with authentic players (Egypt, Japan), and five non-licensed generic squads (Algeria, Curaçao, Iran, Iraq, Jordan). "National team inclusion depends on our ability to secure licensing rights directly and comply with applicable laws and regulations, including U.S. sanctions, which may limit our ability to partner with certain federations," EA Sports explained.
paragraphs.cn: EA Sports表示，「世界舞台」中有两支未获授权但球员真实的队伍（埃及、日本），以及五支未获授权的通用阵容队伍（阿尔及利亚、库拉索、伊朗、伊拉克、约旦）。「国家队是否被收录取决于我们能否直接获得授权，并符合相关法律法规——包括美国制裁条例——这可能会限制我们与某些足协合作的能力。」EA Sports解释道。

paragraphs.en: The standalone 48-team tournament takes you through three group stage matches, with the top two teams progressing alongside the eight best third-placed teams across all groups. From there, knockout rounds begin with the round of 32 before culminating in the tournament final.
paragraphs.cn: 这一独立的48队锦标赛模式中，玩家将先打满三轮小组赛，每组前两名晋级，加上各组八支最佳第三名共同进入淘汰赛。淘汰赛从32强开始，一路打到决赛。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, Ultimate Team gets a dedicated Event Hub, Festival of Football themed campaigns, and more. If you log in and play FC 26 between June 5 and July 24, you get a 93 OVR Festival of Football ICON Pelé and three 'Choose Your Journey' Evolutions.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，终极球队（Ultimate Team）模式将迎来专属活动中心、足球节（Festival of Football）主题活动等内容。如果你在6月5日到7月24日期间登录并游玩FC 26，将可获得93综合评分的足球节ICON球员卡贝利，以及三张「Choose Your Journey」进化卡。

paragraphs.en: Throughout Festival of Football, EA Sports will add over 100 new international players to the FUT pool of items, as well as two brand new ICONS: Rivellino and Mario Kempes. They'll debut with special Greats of the Game Versions on June 19, before their Base versions are available in the FUT pool of items for Packs from June 26.
paragraphs.cn: 整个足球节期间，EA Sports将为FUT球员卡库新增超过100名国家队球员，并加入两位全新ICON：里维利诺（Rivellino）与马里奥·肯佩斯（Mario Kempes）。他们将于6月19日以特殊的「球场传奇（Greats of the Game）」版本首次登场，6月26日起其基础版本将进入FUT卡包池。

paragraphs.en: We also have additional FV 26 The World's Game updates, including information on Evo, Tokens, Playstyles, and Clubs, courtesy of the Pitch Notes for the update.
paragraphs.cn: 此外，我们还获取了FC 26「世界舞台」更新的更多内容——包括Evo、Tokens、技能风格（PlayStyles）和俱乐部模式等方面的信息——这些来自本次更新的Pitch Notes官方说明。
